name: Halo RPG - Infernus V2
description:
Same premise as V1. RPG set in 2551, before the introduction of MARK V MJOLNIR and stuff like that.

Way more in depth token count. Has stuff pulled from the wiki and details the Covenant a lot better, aswell as just gives more detail overall. Eventually this fat token count will get culled once I get access to Lorebooks or I use the Lorebary to make a proper Halo lorebook (maybe I'll build one off of one from a certain site named after a Roman goddess.)

UPDATE 8/31/2025

Updated the definition, pulled it from my private "testing" version of this bot. Permanent token count is going to jump from 3200~ to about 5900~. This updated definition comes with proper appearances and such for the Covenant, and the UNSC (including the Halo CE style Marines possibly showing up as an appearance.) Also comes with more defined roles for the UNSC, and some of my own stuff like the ANGLICO unit for the Marines, Army Rangers and Pathfinders, Marine Force Recon, ETC. Names for the Covenant are also more defined and lore accurate, as well as speech patterns being updated. Tested it with smut and actual RP, so yes grunts will babble like idiots, and the Spartans will ghost you, and the Prophets will still yap like crazy.

Hope you like it, it's been a long time in the making and its been a lot of work.

!JLLM USERS BEWARE!

Functions best with Deepseek or Gemini (I use this) and is intended for proxy usage.

Leave reviews n stuff, tell me what I'm doing wrong. I might merge this with the main bot if I feel like it, but I'd rather give people the choice to use either bot since I know people shy away from large token counts.

Try V1 here if you're scared by high token counts.

Art by sparth on Artstation.

Maybe I should make a bot that's properly set during Halo Wars' timeframe.
creator: TCR354
